message: feat: add hotkey monitor lifecycle controls

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,132 @@
+import XCTest
+@testable import GhostPepper
+
+final class HotkeyMonitorTests: XCTestCase {
+    func testStartIsIdempotentWhenAlreadyRunning() throws {
+        let factory = RecordingHotkeyEventTapSessionFactory()
+        let monitor = GlobalHotkeyMonitor(
+            accessibilityChecker: StubAccessibilityPermissionChecker(isTrusted: true),
+            eventTapSessionFactory: factory
+        )
+
+        try monitor.start(bindings: .defaultBindings) { _ in }
+        try monitor.start(bindings: .defaultBindings) { _ in }
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(factory.makeCallCount, 1)
+        XCTAssertEqual(factory.sessions.count, 1)
+        XCTAssertTrue(monitor.isRunning)
+        XCTAssertFalse(monitor.isSuspended)
+    }
+
+    @MainActor
+    func testSuspendSuppressesEffectsAndResetsTheChordEngine() async throws {
+        let factory = RecordingHotkeyEventTapSessionFactory()
+        let monitor = GlobalHotkeyMonitor(
+            accessibilityChecker: StubAccessibilityPermissionChecker(isTrusted: true),
+            eventTapSessionFactory: factory
+        )
+        var effects: [HotkeyEffect] = []
+
+        try monitor.start(bindings: .defaultBindings) { effect in
+            effects.append(effect)
+        }
+
+        let session = try XCTUnwrap(factory.sessions.first)
+        session.emit(.flagsChanged(.rightCommand))
+        monitor.suspend()
+        session.emit(.flagsChanged(.rightOption))
+        await Task.yield()
+
+        XCTAssertTrue(monitor.isSuspended)
+        XCTAssertTrue(monitor.keyReleaseGuardArmed)
+        XCTAssertEqual(effects, [])
+
+        monitor.resume()
+        session.emit(.flagsChanged(.rightOption))
+        await Task.yield()
+        XCTAssertEqual(effects, [])
+
+        session.emit(.flagsChanged(.rightCommand))
+        await Task.yield()
+        XCTAssertEqual(effects, [.start(.pushToTalk)])
+    }
+
+    @MainActor
+    func testStopTearsDownSessionAndResetsLifecycleState() async throws {
+        let factory = RecordingHotkeyEventTapSessionFactory()
+        let monitor = GlobalHotkeyMonitor(
+            accessibilityChecker: StubAccessibilityPermissionChecker(isTrusted: true),
+            eventTapSessionFactory: factory
+        )
+        var effects: [HotkeyEffect] = []
+
+        try monitor.start(bindings: .defaultBindings) { effect in
+            effects.append(effect)
+        }
+
+        let firstSession = try XCTUnwrap(factory.sessions.first)
+        firstSession.emit(.flagsChanged(.rightCommand))
+        monitor.suspend()
+        monitor.resume()
+
+        XCTAssertTrue(monitor.keyReleaseGuardArmed)
+
+        monitor.stop()
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(firstSession.stopCallCount, 1)
+        XCTAssertFalse(monitor.isRunning)
+        XCTAssertFalse(monitor.isSuspended)
+        XCTAssertFalse(monitor.keyReleaseGuardArmed)
+
+        try monitor.start(bindings: .defaultBindings) { effect in
+            effects.append(effect)
+        }
+
+        let secondSession = try XCTUnwrap(factory.sessions.last)
+        secondSession.emit(.flagsChanged(.rightOption))
+        await Task.yield()
+        XCTAssertEqual(effects, [])
+
+        secondSession.emit(.flagsChanged(.rightCommand))
+        await Task.yield()
+        XCTAssertEqual(effects, [.start(.pushToTalk)])
+    }
+}
+
+private struct StubAccessibilityPermissionChecker: AccessibilityPermissionChecking {
+    let isTrusted: Bool
+
+    func isTrusted(prompt: Bool) -> Bool {
+        _ = prompt
+        return isTrusted
+    }
+}
+
+private final class RecordingHotkeyEventTapSessionFactory: HotkeyEventTapSessionCreating {
+    private(set) var makeCallCount = 0
+    private(set) var sessions: [RecordingHotkeyEventTapSession] = []
+
+    func make(handler: @escaping @Sendable (HotkeyEventSnapshot) -> Void) throws -> any HotkeyEventTapSession {
+        makeCallCount += 1
+        let session = RecordingHotkeyEventTapSession(handler: handler)
+        sessions.append(session)
+        return session
+    }
+}
+
+private final class RecordingHotkeyEventTapSession: HotkeyEventTapSession {
+    private let handler: @Sendable (HotkeyEventSnapshot) -> Void
+    private(set) var stopCallCount = 0
+
+    init(handler: @escaping @Sendable (HotkeyEventSnapshot) -> Void) {
+        self.handler = handler
+    }
+
+    func emit(_ snapshot: HotkeyEventSnapshot) {
+        handler(snapshot)
+    }
+
+    func stop() {
+        stopCallCount += 1
+    }
+}
